mapper.select: select * from focustable where goodstable_id = #{gid} and busertable_id = #{uid}
mapper.insert: insert into focustable (id, goodstable_id, busertable_id, focustime) values(null, #{gid}, #{uid}, now())
mapper.select: select * from carttable where goodstable_id = #{gid} and busertable_id = #{uid}
mapper.insert: insert into carttable (id, busertable_id, goodstable_id, shoppingnum) values(null,#{uid},#{gid},#{bnum})
mapper.update: update carttable set shoppingnum = shoppingnum+#{bnum} where busertable_id = #{uid} and goodstable_id = #{gid}
mapper.delete: delete from carttable where busertable_id = #{uid} and goodstable_id = #{gid}
mapper.insert: insert into orderbasetable (busertable_id, amount, status, orderdate) values(#{buserable_id}, #{amount}, 0, now())
insert into orderdetail (orderbasetable_id, goodstable_id, shoppingnum) select #{ordersn}, goodstable_id, shoppingnum from carttable where busertable_id = #{uid}
mapper.select: select shoppingnum gshoppingnum, goodstable_id gid from carttable where busertable_id = #{uid}
mapper.update: update goodstable set gstore = gstore - #{gshoppingnum} where id = #{gid}
update orderbasetable set status = 1 where id = #{ordersn}
mapper.select: select od.*, gt.gname, gt.gpicture, gt.grprice from orderdetail od, goodstable gt where od.goodstable_id = gt.id and od.orderbasetable_id = #{id}
mapper.update: update busertable set bpwd=#{bpwd} where id=#{uid}
